description: Style NoteAn essential for every woman's wardrobe, this floral print T-shirt is a cool, wearable top to add to your collection. The soft cotton fabric keeps you comfy all day. Pair it with skinny jeans and sandals for a casual look.Product DetailsRed floral print T-shirt,with a round-neck, short sleeves gathered on the shoulders and cuffs with a key hole and button detail on the cuff, has pin-tucks below the neckline and tie-up detail at the waistMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash cold with like colours using a mild detergentTurn inside out before washing and dryingDo not bleach or wringTumble dry or flat dry in shadeWarm iron; do not iron on decorationsSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
